title: baptisia lanceolata var. tomentosa
intro: Baptisia lanceolata var. tomentosa, also known as hairy blue false indigo, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family and native to the eastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Baptisia lanceolata var. tomentosa include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Baptisia lanceolata var. tomentosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for different applications in traditional medicine.
